subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou art my refuge and the sanctuary of my aspirations, the ultimate object of my hopes and the pinnacle of my desire. I beseech the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی انت ملاذی و کهف آمالی و منتهی املی و غایه رجائی انی ابتهل الی ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for purity; chastity, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for spiritual recognition
